run111_new_findings.detail: Run110 deactivated btc_short_90plus_boost_v1 using aggregate BTC SHORT EV. Disaggregated: 70-80% conf is sole drag (EV=-$91.87). 80-90%: EV=+$59.52. 90%+: EV=+$102.92. CORRECTED Run111.
SOL_LONG EV=-$2.62 (WR below BE-WR). SOL_SHORT EV=+$32.44. Combined SOL stat masked this for 110 runs. sol_long_probe_boost_v1 gate reduced 50->20.
